response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates exceptional technical depth and leadership experience across multiple high-profile companies, including Stripe and Shopify, with a strong focus on modern software systems, architecture, and team mentorship. His open-source contributions and entrepreneurial ventures highlight his strategic thinking and innovation. While his German proficiency is basic (not meeting the required C1 level), his English is fluent, and his overall profile aligns well with the Tech Lead role. The lack of explicit UML expertise is a minor gap but offset by his architectural design experience.
strengths: Extensive senior leadership in software development at top-tier companies (Stripe, Shopify)
Strong background in open-source contributions and system architecture (e.g., Geo-Data platform, Dlang projects)
Proven track record in team mentorship, CI/CD, and modern software practices (TDD, Pairing, Trunk-based development)
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' falling short of the required C1 level
Limited explicit mention of UML expertise in resume or projects
Recent employment at Stripe (April 2025–Present) may limit availability or focus on new opportunities
